underlying: Minnesota U.S. Senate 2026 D-R margin in pp (open seat, Smith retiring; D nominee Flanagan or Craig vs Tafoya)
method: Anchored on (a) Klobuchar 2024 +16 over White, (b) Smith 2020 +5.2 (much closer), (c) recent open-seat polling: Flanagan +6 vs Tafoya, Craig +7 vs Tafoya (Newsweek/internal), (d) Sabato 'Leans D' rating (downgraded from Likely D), (e) open seat + R-trending light-blue state. Mu=+8 averages Smith 2020 and recent head-to-heads, with mild D-environment tailwind. Sigma 7 reflects competitive race + thin polling.
notes: Most competitive of the 8. Open seat after Tina Smith retirement; Sabato downgraded to 'Leans D'. Recent polls: Flanagan/Craig +6 to +7 vs Tafoya (Newsweek). Klobuchar's +16 in 2024 is upper bound; Smith's +5 in 2020 is a more relevant prior given open seat. Mu=+8 a touch above polling head-to-heads to credit D-environment swing. Sigma 7 wide; medium-left tail risk of an R upset (~10-15% based on this distribution).
